LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Iron.label: arrow (iron)
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Iron.description: Simple arrow design with a cutting head attached to a wooden shaft.
LanguageData.Projectile_Arrow_Iron.label: arrow (iron)
LanguageData.Projectile_StreamlinedArrow_Iron.label: streamlined arrow (iron)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Iron.label: great arrow (iron)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Iron.description: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a great bow.
LanguageData.Projectile_GreatArrow_Iron.label: great arrow (iron)
